name: Oblong Traditional Tweed Decorative Throw Pillow Natural Brown - Threshold™
description:
Lend a touch of warmth and style to your interior decor with the Oblong Traditional Tweed Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™. This oblong throw pillow features a natural brown tweed on one side and solid beige on other side for a two-tone look. This throw pillow offers comfort and warmth and it's recommended for indoor use. Place this tweed throw pillow on your bed or couch to complete the look of your space.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
